basic.description:
{Basic Armorer}
Reduces 5% physical damage and casts Stone Skin at battle opening for 10 rounds

advanced.description:
{Advanced Armorer}
Reduces 10% physical damage and casts Stone Skin at battle opening for 20 rounds

expert.description:
{Expert Armorer}
Reduces 15% physical damage and casts Stone Skin at battle opening for 40 rounds
